User-agent: *
Allow: /

=======
# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap
=======
=======
=======
# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap
=======
=======

# Allow all crawlers
Allow: /about
Allow: /services
Allow: /contact
Allow: /blog
Allow: /careers
Allow: /faq
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /static/

# Crawl delay (optional)
Crawl-delay: 1

# Specific rules for major search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# Block AI training bots
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Disallow: /

User-agent: Omgilibot
Disallow: /
